title: CSIR CFTRI Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 02 Project Associate I, Project Assistant II Posts
description: The CSIR Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Project Associate I and Project Assistant II posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.Sc. and M.Sc. can apply for the CSIR CFTRI Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education det...
